programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Faces of Africa
programme.desc: Faces of Africa is a topical magazine that showcases the diversity of the continent.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air Cargo 8509 si schianta in un campo a nord-est di Londra.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Nigeria Airways 2120 esplode in una palla di fuoco, uccidendo tutte le 261 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo gira misteriosamente intorno all’aeroporto di Atene. Qual è l’enigma del volo 522?

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: L’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo British Airways 111 sanno che qualcosa non va per niente bene.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 dell’Ethiopian Airlines dirottato rimane senza carburante vicino alle Isole Comore.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Chi sta Pilotando l’Aereo?” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo aereo pendolare, il volo Air Midwest 5481, è in un breve tragitto quando si verifica il disastro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Crossair 3597 è in fase di avvicinamento finale, ma poco prima dell’atterraggio non trova la pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno merci che attraversa la periferia deraglia e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Rivivi l’incredibile storia di un pilota costretto a far planare in sicurezza un 767 senza motori.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Southern Airways 242 entra in una violenta tempesta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo SAS 686 decolla nella fitta nebbia dell’aeroporto di Linate, a Milano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Uno dei disastri più allarmanti nella storia dell’aviazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo British Airways 38 subisce un guasto inspiegabile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Arrow Air 1285 fa rifornimento e pochi secondi dopo il decollo si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Flash Airlines 604 si schianta nel Mar Rosso pochi minuti dopo il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo ASA 529 perde una delle sue quattro eliche mentre è in viaggio verso Gulfport, Mississippi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air Inter 148 inizia la discesa verso l’aeroporto di Strasburgo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente la presenza di una bomba a bordo del volo Continental Express 2574.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi secondi dopo il decollo, i motori iniziano a emettere una serie di forti boati in rapida successione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I voli United Airlines 585 e US Air 585 si schiantano a pochi anni di distanza l’uno dall’altro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un operatore radar militare identifica erroneamente un aereo civile in avvicinamento come un F-14 ostile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti sono diretti a Phoenix, in Arizona, ma prima devono trovare la loro pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Cruel Skies” ripercorre quattro disastri aerei cruciali e mancate tragedie.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Negli ultimi secondi del volo, l’aereo precipita improvvisamente dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Per trovare la causa dello schianto del volo South African Airlines 295, dovettero scavare a fondo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Airlines 007 vola alto sopra il Mar del Giappone con 269 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una breve tratta si trasforma rapidamente in un incubo per l’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo 243.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 708 sta attraversando un uragano moderato quando l’aereo precipita.

programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a far atterrare d’emergenza il loro 747 danneggiato in Alaska.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno VIA Rail si scontra frontalmente con un enorme treno merci.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 1549 collide con uno stormo di uccelli.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un comandante lotta per mantenere l’aereo in volo e improvvisamente precipita verso il suolo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo che trasporta un gruppo di scolari è su una rotta di collisione con un aereo cargo della DHL.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E03 - Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on The New space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E04 - Invasion Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare The New missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E03 - Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series, two of which need the help of Special Effects expert Andre Ellingson, including lighting a gas tank on fire and chemically burning through a steel door.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E04 - Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry's dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test two scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow. Terry will find out if they can save a man trapped in cement shoes, and then they will do a seemingly impossible test.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E39 - A Century Of The Queen Mother 100 Years In 100 Minutes
programme.desc: 100 years of celebration in 100 minutes

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E05 - Life and Death
programme.desc: Temperate Rain Forest Pt2. Jim comes face to face with a monster black bear in the coastal rain forest of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E11 - Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E12 - Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E03 - Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on The New space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E04 - Invasion Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare The New missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E03 - Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series, two of which need the help of Special Effects expert Andre Ellingson, including lighting a gas tank on fire and chemically burning through a steel door.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E04 - Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry's dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test two scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow. Terry will find out if they can save a man trapped in cement shoes, and then they will do a seemingly impossible test.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E39 - A Century Of The Queen Mother 100 Years In 100 Minutes
programme.desc: 100 years of celebration in 100 minutes

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E05 - Life and Death
programme.desc: Temperate Rain Forest Pt2. Jim comes face to face with a monster black bear in the coastal rain forest of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E11 - Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E12 - Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E06 - Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan. Jim and Corey journey to the Tian Shan mountain range in search of high altitude mountain dwelling sheep and ibex.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E13 - Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk poaching and illegally tagged deer.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E14 - Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana, Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station, while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E05 - Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter. and The New Horizons speeds on it its next encounter at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E06 - Sling Shot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination, we checkout the latest probes about to slingshot about the solar system.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E05 - Getting to Know Rick O'Shea
programme.desc: In this episode we get know Larry's friend Rick O'Shea (Ricochet). Terry and Larry test several different films where bullets are manipulated in order to get an amazing result. They test scenes from Skyfall, Suicide Squad, American Ultra, and The Bear.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S03:E06 - We Hear Ya!
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers. They will test a bunch of crazy scenes from Bad Boys 2, Under Siege, A License to Kill, and Bangkok Dangerous.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E06 - Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan. Jim and Corey journey to the Tian Shan mountain range in search of high altitude mountain dwelling sheep and ibex.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E13 - Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk poaching and illegally tagged deer.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E14 - Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana, Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station, while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S03:E05 - Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter. and The New Horizons speeds on it its next encounter at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E07 - Death for Profit
programme.desc: Ivan Carter joins the heroes saving rhinos in Africa's Kruger National Park

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E07 - Naturally Fascinating
programme.desc: Bolivia is a country of countless fascinating natural sights. We will begin on the high plateau of Altiplano, stopping by the world’s largest salt lake.Later, we will descend a few thousand meters using the road of death to the Los Yungas province. And then on to the shores of lake Titicaca, the highest navigable lake in the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E08 - Naturally Harmonious
programme.desc: Zambia, the Latvian region of Kurzeme, the Georgian provinces of Kakheti and Svaneti, seem to have very little in common. They lie in Africa, Europe and on the borderline between Europe and Asia respectively. Kakheti and Svaneti are both a part of Georgia but very unlike one another. So where is the connection? How are these regions similar?

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E09 - Naturally Spiritual
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two different corners of our planet. Although thousands of kilometres apart, spiritually they are close relatives. First, Ethiopia in East Africa which is dissected by the Great African Rift Valley and considered by many to be the cradle of humankind. Next, a paradise on Earth: Jamaica.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E10 - Naturally Resilient
programme.desc: Today‘s journey in search of more miracles of nature brings us to the Masurian Lake District which is an impressive water world in north-eastern Poland. We will then trade in the cool Baltic region for tropical Caribbean. Here we will prove that it would be wrong to link the Cuban province of Guantanamo only with the famous American naval base. To wrap things up, we will return to Europe’s Mediterranean region to visit people of the Lipari Islands who continue to survive in the shade of ever-smouldering volcanoes.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E02 - Alaska Caribou Part 1
programme.desc: Deep in the Alaskan territory, Laramy hunts the frontier in search of caribou. When a hungry grizzly sniffs around camp, will Laramy's single shot rifle be enough protection?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E03 - Montana Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Laramy lets loose the dogs and rides the snowy mountains in search of the big game cat of North America, the mountain lion.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E04 - Trapping Part 1
programme.desc: Springtime begins as Laramy honors the history of the mountain men by trapping for beaver and other critters.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E05 - Alaska Caribou Part 2
programme.desc: Deep in the Alaskan territory, Laramy hunts for caribou until a severe accident with the Hawken throws the whole hunt into question.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E03 - Blue Water Savages Part 2
programme.desc: 60 miles offshore, surrounded by multiple mako and blue sharks, Manny Puig has the most thrilling shark encounters of his life.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E04 - The Rock Quarry
programme.desc: Exploring a flooded, abandoned mine at night, Manny Puig searches for predators as he attempts to understand this isolated and savage world.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E05 - Primal River
programme.desc: Manny explores a primitive river in search of dangerous encounters and is not disappointed.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature’s most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Tornadoes; they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera; from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!

programme.title: Sinister Storms
programme.desc: Take a look at instances of nature that prove that we have no control over it.

programme.title: Sinister Storms

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: It’s an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Indagando su un brutale omicidio, la scientifica aveva chiara una cosa: l'assassino conosceva la vittima.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una guardia di sicurezza è scomparsa dalla sua postazione senza lasciare traccia. I suoi resti furono ritrovati un anno dopo in un campeggio sperduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza di 13 anni scomparve dalla sua casa in Colorado e l'unica prova che il rapitore aveva lasciato erano tre impronte digitali su una zanzariera.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, l'immobiliarista texana Sarah Anne Walker fu trovata brutalmente uccisa in una casa modello. Settimane dopo si presentò un testimone che forse vide il killer. La polizia usò l'ipnosi forense per fargli evocare i dettagli fisici dell'uomo.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In un tragico scherzo del destino, pochi giorni dopo che la donna vendette casa e si traslocò in un umile caravan, un incendio le tolse sia il caravan che la vita. Ma l'autopsia dimostrò che non fu un incidente.

programme.desc: Un chirurgo viene colpito a morte e il sospettato principale viene visto al ristorante al momento del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Nel 2006, la politica del Nevada Kathy Augustine morì misteriosamente in un'accanita campagna di rielezione e il medico legale non riuscì né ad individuare la causa di morte né a spiegare le piccole ferite da puntura scoperte durante l'autopsia.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il weekend del 4 luglio finisce in tragedia per una famiglia californiana. Per catturare l'assassino, i detective utilizzano una tecnica non ortodossa, analizzando frammenti di cimici, per poter mettere l'assassino dietro le sbarre.

programme.desc: Una famiglia piange l'inaspettata morte dell'amata nonna a Natale. La polizia locale assicura a tutti che si è trattato di un tragico incidente e non di un delitto. Ma alcune cose sulla scena non tornano.

programme.desc: A seguito della morte improvvisa di una donna attenta alla salute, iniziano le indagini sulle possibili cause.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Al centro della prima prova di questa puntata troviamo le passioni di Costantino della Gherardesca, ogni piatto dovrà rappresentarle.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: E’ il giorno della finale a Hell’s Kitchen. I cuochi si svegliano e trovano sul tavolo una sorpresa: ci sono 4 buste per loro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I concorrenti alloggiano nel loft di Hell's Kitchen e hanno una notte intera per studiare il menu che serviranno la sera successiva. Durante la notte i concorrenti vengono svegliati continuamente da una sirena e su un televisore assistono alle lezioni di cucina dello Chef Cracco. Alle 8:00 i concorrenti scendono nelle cucine e Cracco mostra loro come tagliare la carne per fare il filetto alla Rossini.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio non va bene e Cracco è costretto a chiudere anticipatamente prima la cucina blu e poi la cucina rossa. I concorrenti vengono mandati nel loft e hanno 30 minuti di tempo per decidere i loro nominati per l'eliminazione. La squadra rossa nomina Lorena e Amelia, la squadra blu Andrea e Gene.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si affrontano in una sfida diretta sull'assaggio: i due concorrenti, bendati e dotati di cuffie, devono individuare quattro diversi alimenti solo assaggiandoli; vince la squadra che indovina il maggior numero di alimenti. La prova termina in parità, quindi vi è uno spareggio fra i concorrenti più forti delle due squadre (Lorenza e Gianluca) che determina la vittoria dei rossi. Per punizione, la squadra blu deve pulire 90 kg di pesce per il servizio, mentre la squadra rossa si gode alcune ore in un centro benessere.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gordon sfida gli altri chef a stupirlo con i loro piatti forti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti chef sono messi ancora più sotto pressione poiché a cena avranno come ospiti delle grandi celebrità.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar 3 - si salvi chi può!

programme.title: Air Bud 3

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar
programme.desc: La vita del musicista Dave Neville sta per essere sconvolta dall’arrivo di tre scoiattoli canterini: Alvin, Simon e Theodore. Tre forze della natura che, oltre a devastargli la casa, distruggergli la carriera e stravolgergli completamente la vita, si rivelano una band musicale strepitosa.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Gigante Bue Grasso aiuta Gargamella a cercare il villaggio dei Puffi per cucinare un'appetitosa zuppa di Puffo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore crea un Puffo meccanico per aiutare i puffi nelle loro attività quotidiane. I Puffi sono molto contenti ma qualcosa va storto…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Pigrone sogna di trovarsi in un paradiso puffato in cui si può riposare senza dover svolfere tutti i lavori che Grande Puffo gli affida. | Quattrocchi organizza un viaggio in cima alla Montagna Ghiacciata per raccogliere il polline del Fior di Neve di cui Grande Puffo ha bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi scoprono una sorgente che hai il potere di ringiovanire chi ne beve l'acqua. Grande Puffo la beve e si trasforma in un piccolo Puffo che crea gran confusione nel villaggio…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il re Argon è grande, prepotente e cattivo, ma il suo mago Mordain è ancora peggio. Vuol usare i Puffi per rubare tutto l'oro del re!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffetta ha una nuova amica, Laura, una bimba di sei anni i cui genitori vivono sul limitare del bosco. | Golosone ha esagerato! E diventato così grosso che il suo peso gli è di impaccio e Gargamella sta per catturarlo! Riuscirà il Grande Puffo a salvare il Puffo grassottello?

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Una missione nella palude non è certo un compito adatto al Puffo Pauroso. Chi sfiderà dunque il mostro della palude se non il Puffo che non poteva dire di no?

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Nessuno batte il Puffo Inventore! Ha creato una macchina ingegnosa che coltiva le verdure e cuoce tutto automaticamente. Si puffi chi può! | L'inverno è arrivato all'improvviso e tutti i Puffi si sono ammalati!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi ha deciso di dedicarsi alla medicina ed alla salute dei Puffi… Con un piccolo aiuto del terribile Gargamella!

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Jack Il Ciclone
programme.desc: Jack è tornato e stavolta è alle prese congli half-pipe delle cime innevate del Colorado. Jack fa squadra con due fratelli e diventa presto un campione dello snowboard! Le sue abilità lo portano dove nessuno scimpanzé era stato prima.

programme.title: Air Bud 3
programme.desc: Quando Emma, la nuova ragazzina carina,si unisce alla squadra di calcio maschile, Josh e Buddy decidono che quest’anno si gioca a calcio. Come Josh ed Emma iniziano a conoscersi, Buddy e Molly, il cane di Emma, iniziano a incontrarsi fugacemente di notte.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: The Duke - Il Duca
programme.desc: Quando Hubert, il fedele compagno a quattro zampe del Duca di Dingwall, eredita le proprietà del Duca, fa squadra con la nipote del Maggiordomo per contrastare alcuni avidi parenti del caro estinto.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Questa è la tenera storia dell'amicizia tra Puffetta ed un piccolo topolino. Un triste evento porta Puffetta alle lacrime… Riusciranno i Puffi a ridonarle il sorriso? | Il Puffo Sognatore desidera tanto incontrare gle extraterrestri, ma nessuno gli dà retta.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Simon si è perso nella foresta ed è alla ricerca dei suoi genitori. Simon è figlio di una coppia di giganti. I Puffi cercano di riportarlo a casa, ma Gargamella interrompe la festa.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il furto dell'oro delle Fate da parte di Gargamella porta quasi a uno stato di guerra tra le Fate e i Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Lo spettacolo teatrale dei Puffi "Robin Puffo" prende vita: il leggendario eroe è interpretato da un attore davvero bravo...

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: La storia si inspira ai celebri moschettieri di Dumas, ma non mancano riferimenti a Romeo e Giulietta… Una cascata di allegria insieme ai simpatici Puffi!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi si stanno preparando al Natale riempiendo il villaggio di addobbi, colori e allegria. Gargamella, che odida il Natale, decide di fare di tutto per rovinare loro la festa.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Una volta nella luna blu, come narra la leggenda, un cucciolo di Puffo viene consegnato ai Puffi e tutti gli abitanti del villaggio si affezionano al nuovo arrivato.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Giorno del Puffo d’Aprile si rivela non essere così divertente quando Gargamella si traveste da cespuglio di puffbacche per catturare gli allegri puffetti. | Con una ricetta presa in prestito da Homnibus, Grande Puffo crea un bastone magico che Maldestro prende e perde nel bosco.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Mentre i Puffi si preparano per il Festival delle Stelle, Gargamella pianta in mezzo a loro una creatura che puzza così tanto di marcio da poter essere facilmente rintracciata nel villaggio dei Puffi. | Il villaggio dei Puffi istituisce una squadra di pompieri per combattere le fiamme.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Le grandi famiglie del vino
programme.desc: Feudo Arancio - Dal Trentino alla Sicilia. Siamo a Sambuca dove Feudo Arancio, di proprietà di Mezzacorona, produce i suoi vini. Vini sostenibili che testimoniano l’amore per questa terra e per l’ambiente.

programme.title: Max alla brace
programme.desc: S.2 - Max Mariola in cortile alle prese con un bbq. Ricette gustose e originali da realizzare nel giardino di casa o per passare qualche ora all’aperto

programme.title: Sardegna experience
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Luigi Pomata nella sua Sardegna, dall'entroterra al mare un caleidoscopio di sapori e saperi. Luoghi, persone e tradizioni che rendono unica questa isola

programme.title: L'isola del Barone S2
programme.desc: Mini conchiglioni peperoni e salsiccia. Ritorna il Barone, Andrea Lo Cicero, con le ricette della sua amata Sicilia. Sapori inconfondibili che Andrea elabora mantenendone inalterato il legame con il territorio.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Singapore
programme.desc: Garden by the bay - L’area di Marina bay è la parte più moderna della città del Leone, sempre più meta di viaggio tra cultura, mondanità e cibo da scoprire, qui si trovano i luoghi più ambiti e i ristoranti più esclusivi.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by France - French Fennel Soup, Japan - Unagi-Style Soy Glazed Figs, Morocco - Moroccan Butterbean Tagine, and Mexico - Asparagus Ceviche!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Inspired by flaky, buttery, and chocolatey dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.desc: In this episode of Up the Dish, host Micah Trainor takes a stab at Cassoulet with buttery white beans, duck leg confit, and flavourful French sausage - and the result is mouth-wateringly good! The pressure's on, but Tiera Singh doesn't let up with her Chinese Long Bean Stir Fry. Succulent sausage, delicious duck breast, and flavorful vegetables come together for a truly sumptuous dish! For her vegetarian variant, Missy Hui must move things up a notch, but how? Agedashi Tofu! Breaded crispy semi-firm tofu is doused in a dashi, gochujang, and mirin mixture for the ultimate umami mouthful. Poppy Sandler goes above and beyond with her Chocolate-crusted Elk Loin, seared and drizzled with a...

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: In Mary’s Kitchen by his friend, Mary Berg! Follow along as Shahir prepares French onion pot roast, creamy lobster gnocchi, lemony piccata, and much more!

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make avocado toast and tacos, Liam whips up an easy pantry pasta, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a favorite one pot meal!

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.desc: On the Dine Your Sign Spring Special, Chef Siobhan Detkavich is cooking for Aries, Taurus, and Gemini! First, quiche with the season’s most delicious gifts – tender asparagus and earthy morels – suspended in silky custard and smothered in creamy fontina cheese! Next, spring lamb is stuffed with a sprightly pesto of mint and dandelion greens and roasted with shallots and new potatoes. Then, it’s an easy, healthy halibut dish with ramps (aka ‘wild garlic’) and grassy fiddleheads – the fish is steamed and finished with a sizzling pour over oil treatment that leaves the kitchen smelling like heaven! Finally, dessert a spring sign is sure to love: buttery, flaky croissant, stuffed with rich...

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.desc: Chef Siobhan is all in for Taurus! She starts with a hearty, meaty, braised lamb shank and earthy aromatics for an earth sign. Plus some Yorkshire Puddings cooked in lamb fat, too! The next dish is salad Taurus style! A wedge salad with hard-cooked eggs and homemade ranch dressing! Next, a medley of green peas with seared scallops. Finally, a single-serve, no-sharing dessert for Taurus: a whole Granny Smith apple dumpling, stuffed with cheddar cheese, wrapped in pastry, and baked golden brown!

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: The griddle becomes a canvas for creativity as pancakes evolve from humble breakfast fare to colorful works of art. Inventive batters, textures, and toppings transform a simple stack into something worth flipping over.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: After revealing his DNA results, host Tyrone Edwards accompanies Jacob Ahee on a journey of self-discovery as he explores his newfound roots through food.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Thai host Palin Congchitnant uses fresh Thai ingredients and flavours to make Smoked Trout Salad and a Kaffir Lime Vodka Martini.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong loves cooking lamb, and with his expert advice, you will too!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen schools us on traditional Japanese foods as she makes tofu rice pockets, miso glazes, and rice flour dumplings.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Cantonese expert Mary Tang showcases traditional dishes from the Chinese coastal territory, Hong Kong. To kick off the episode, Mary rolls up and steams a batch of fluffy Shrimp Dumplings. Next, tender beef with chewy rice noodles and fermented black beans is on the menu. This dish is doused in a fun and tasty dressing featuring salty soy sauce, tart Shaoxing wine, sweet oyster sauce, and a medley of spices. With a sturdy clay pot, Mary then cooks up some savoury Chinese sausage and lays it on a bed of aromatic rice. To top it off, why not some delicious Pineapple Buns? These buns are pillowy and sweet; you'll be surprised to hear that they contain zero pineapple!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: There's nothing more authentic than street food - Vietnamese style! Host Lisa Nguyen shares her tips and tricks on tasty Lemongrass-infused Beef Wraps. A vast array of ingredients including peppery betel leaves, gorgeous greens and crunchy peanuts complement the tenderness of flavoursome, marinated ground beef. Lisa's next dish is an iconic Vietnamese street food - crispy Sizzling Crepes with juicy pork belly and earthy vegetables will definitely activate your taste buds. For dessert, Lisa whips up a batch of sweet coconut pudding using beautiful bananas and velvety coconut milk sprinkled with roasted sesame seeds for some crunch.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Sweet and sour are definitely on the menu as Thai-born chef Pailin Chongchitnant whips up glass noodle salad, sour curry, sweet and sour stir fry, and pineapple and lychee in iced syrup.

programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Eva Bee as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.desc: Disfruta de impresionantes escenas de muchas de las creaciones milagrosas de Dios.

programme.desc: Acompáñennos mientras celebramos la vida, la fe y el legado de la cofundadora y presidenta de Daystar, Joni Lamb, cuyo impacto afectó a vidas en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Pastor Sam Rodriguez
programme.desc: El pastor Samuel Rodriguez comparte la palabra del señor con enseñanzas, ilustraciones, y verdades que desatan la gloria de Dios en esta generación.

programme.desc: Encuentre respuestas en la Palabra de Dios y aprenda a vivir cada día con un propósito mientras Jentezen Franklin presenta la verdad clara que lo inspirará.

programme.desc: El padre Charles Stanley nos pondrá en contacto con Dios y nos mostrará alternativas viables para confiar en Él y en su poder.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack La Verdad Del Evangelio
programme.desc: Andrew Wommack comparte cómo la Palabra de Dios transformó su vida. Él cree que el mismo poder puede obrar para ti.

programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: El Dr. David Jeremiah, pastor principal de Shadow Mountain Community Church en El Cajon, California, entrega la Palabra de Dios a un mundo en constante cambio.

programme.desc: Hoy hablamos sobre el abuso en el matrimonio y ofrecemos pasos prácticos y principios bíblicos para fomentar relaciones sanas y llenos de respeto.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Memoirs18 May
programme.desc: Memoirs18 May

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: This episode serves up a fusion of flavors, starting with soft and fluffy bao buns filled with tender duck, followed by the delicate sweetness of chewy mochi for dessert. A journey of taste that blends comfort, creativity, and a touch of indulgence.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh of Egypt, captivated empires with her intelligence, charm, and enduring influence.

programme.title: Whats On Mediterranean Special Events
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Memoirs18 May
programme.desc: Memoirs18 May

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: In Milan we'll take a peek at Italy's highest fashion, fanciest delis, grandest cemetery, and greatest opera house...not to mention Leonardo's "Last Supper." Then we'll cruise Lake Como, settling down in the lakeside village of Varenna.

programme.title: Malini Egypt
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Egypt for the first time, exploring Cairo and the Pyramids of Giza. Beyond the headlines and common tourist warnings, she discovers unexpected warmth, culture, and a different side to these iconic places.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta travels to San Vito Lo Capo in Sicily, retracing the footsteps of Saracen pirates who once haunted the Mediterranean. Amid coastal landscapes and historical echoes, the journey explores local traditions shaped by centuries of cultural exchange. Couscous, legends, and sea stories bring the spirit of Sicily’s past vividly to life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Join Rick as he roams the lively streets of Barcelona, savoring its artistic treasures and flavorful tapas, before venturing to nearby landmarks in the proudly distinct region of Catalunya.

programme.title: Great Myths the Iliad
programme.desc: This beautifully animated documentary series tells us the story of Homer’s Iliad, the epic poem of Ancient Greece recounting the Trojan War. In this episode Eris, the goddess of strife and discord, sends an apple to Mount Olympus which causes trouble amongst the gods.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Tuscany, one of Italy’s most picturesque and beloved regions. From rolling vineyards and medieval hill towns to art-filled cities, she discovers the essence of la dolce vita. Malini enjoys local wine tastings, traditional Tuscan dishes, and breathtaking landscapes, capturing the timeless charm and warmth that make Tuscany truly unforgettable.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Med Nations 09 Slovenia
programme.desc: Med Nations 09 Slovenia

programme.title: Whats On Waves and Rhythms
programme.desc: From seaside beats to floating stages, this episode captures Mediterranean music by the water. Malta Boomerang Festival and Earth Garden celebrate eco conscious music and arts, while Spain Bilbao BBK fuses urban culture with live performances. Set sail on the Mediterranea Metal Cruise, a unique floating festival, and enjoy Malta iconic Jazz Festival with historic and coastal backdrops. The Mediterranean truly comes alive where music meets the waves.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Mediterraneo

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland

The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.
